narrative:
Precinct Scioto West (precinct in Ross County) has 871 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
